text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Here I come, Satsuki Sho! I'm not gonna waste
this chance to win you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, they're seriously broadcasting this
live. I feel sick... What if I embarrass myself? Or
let everyone down? Ugh, I wanna go home...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown, is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere is electric with the racers'
emotions. Their joy and anxiety at qualifying for
the Satsuki Sho, their fear—it all churns thickly in
the air.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Everyone's so damn annoying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur appears to be having a difficult time
shutting out the energy and emotions of those
around her.
choice_data_list: Well, it is the Satsuki Sho.
Well, it is the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's no different from any other race. You run,
someone wins. That's it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why waste energy gettin' all antsy before the
race?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm also what? Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nearly point out that she's talking a lot more
than usual, but I decide against it so as not to
upset her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's in her racewear, Shakur looks
calmer than she did this morning, but... she still
looks agitated.
choice_data_list: You managed to hit your target numbers, right?
You managed to hit your target numbers, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but just barely. What're you askin' me that
for now?
choice_data_list:
Because that makes you the strongest racer
here today.

Because that makes you the strongest racer
here today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: See you in a bit.
choice_data_list: (It should be fine. Shakur looks calm enough.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to hope she can replicate the
results of her countless simulations on the track.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Air Shakur! I wonder how she's—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Glare!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Gulp. Sh-she's in fighting form, as always...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh... the noise is grating on me more than
usual. Is the Satsuki Sho always this bad?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(No, I know what's behind this. Dammit, my heart
rate's so high...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Deep breaths. The numbers'll prove it soon
enough.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They'll prove without a doubt that I'm the
strongest one here today.
